name: figma-designai
description: AI-powered design system generator, screen creator, and code exporter for Figma

scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:code && npm run build:inline
scripts.build:inline: mkdir -p dist && cp src/ui.css dist/ui.css && node build-inline.js
scripts.test:minimal: mkdir -p dist && cp src/ui-minimal.js dist/ui.js && npm run copy:assets
scripts.copy:assets: mkdir -p dist && cp src/ui.html dist/ui.html && cp src/ui.css dist/ui.css

author: Rico
